g.text: Trust: 100/100 (high) — 'bye' or '/end' to disconnect | /? for help
Ask Yuleth what trade items she would prefer to exchange for the
Hmph. A crash-lander, are you? Tell me more about your ship and
where you came from. I'm Yuleth, and things on Enceladus are not always easy
I might be able to offer some guidance, but I can't just wander ov
and start fixing things for a stranger. I need to know what you need and why
you are here on my moon.
Ask Yuleth about the creature's history or preferred trading
routes to gauge their knowledge base further.
